title: Rich Mediterranean Steak Skewers
description: A jammy, fluffy Mediterranean dish perfect for a date night, featuring tender skirt steak skewered and glazed with a luscious date-lavender sauce.
instructions: Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, date paste, mustard, minced garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper until well blended.
Toss the steak cubes in the glaze, ensuring each piece is coated; let marinate for 10 minutes.
Thread the marinated steak onto soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small gap between pieces.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side for medium-rare, brushing additional glaze while turning.
Remove the skewers and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Sprinkle fresh oregano or parsley over the finished skewers for a burst of color.
Serve immediately with a side of couscous or a fresh green salad.
For a truly jammy finish, serve with extra glaze on the side.
Enjoy your rich Mediterranean steak skewers on a cozy date night.
